debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X Y : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hY : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m Y u q P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => X ω ∩ Y ω) P

proof:
⟨fun ω => hX.aemeasurable.mk X ω ∩ hY.aemeasurable.mk Y ω,
    measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i => by
      change Measurable (fun ω => i ∈ hX.aemeasurable.mk X ω ∧ i ∈ hY.aemeasurable.mk Y ω)
      exact ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp hX.aemeasurable.measurable_mk).and
        ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp hY.aemeasurable.measurable_mk),
    by filter_upwards [hX.aemeasurable.ae_eq_mk, hY.aemeasurable.ae_eq_mk] with ω hXω hYω;
       simp [hXω, hYω]⟩
successful_attempts:
⟨fun ω => hX.aemeasurable.mk X ω ∩ hY.aemeasurable.mk Y ω,
    measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i => by
      change Measurable (fun ω => i ∈ hX.aemeasurable.mk X ω ∧ i ∈ hY.aemeasurable.mk Y ω)
      exact ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp hX.aemeasurable.measurable_mk).and
        ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp hY.aemeasurable.measurable_mk),
    by filter_upwards [hX.aemeasurable.ae_eq_mk, hY.aemeasurable.ae_eq_mk] with ω hXω hYω;
       simp [hXω, hYω]⟩
